name: Flock-You
description: Passive Flock Safety ALPR (automated license-plate reader) camera detector — sniffs the WiFi/BLE beacons Flock cameras emit. Source-first build (PlatformIO); formal releases may 404, which the flash core tolerates.
note: colonelpanichacks/flock-you (NOT lozaning). Passive ALPR detector, not a drone/RemoteID tool.
